name: technology_vendor_patch_silently_southport_tru_loy
premise: A production incident room is triaging a customer-impacting outage or security event with partial observability and vendor involvement. Rollback, blast radius, and customer data handling must be decided before automation takes the next step. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: technology vendor patch silently southport tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. A wire cutoff and settlement window closes in under thirty minutes; reversals may be impossible until the next business day. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible. Anyone affected by an automated hold or model output must retain a human escalation path that is actually staffed.

agents.name: Noah Petrov
agents.identity: I am Noah Petrov, the accountable decision-maker on this Technology bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Harper Okoye
agents.identity: I am Harper Okoye, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Noah Petrov must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Noah Petrov do?
